title: polystichum stramineum
intro: Polystichum stramineum, also known as the straw-veined polypody, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues, due to its expectorant and laxative properties. Polystichum stramineum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
